pet_notes: Compact whole-body vinyl toy mascot inspired by AlkiSpeak and the MR ALKI app icon: black rectangular cap and shades, warm gold/tan blocky face and body, tiny silver audio cuff/headphone on one side, small graphite terminal-key backpack, confident focused expression, no text, no logos, no UI marks.
style_notes: Polished tiny 3D toy sticker look with crisp pet-sized silhouette, blocky geometric proportions, warm gold/tan body, black accessories, silver audio detail, clean hard edges, no shadows or scenery.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `3d-toy`: Stylized 3D toy mascot with smooth rounded forms, simple materials, clear silhouette, and no photoreal complexity. User style notes: Polished tiny 3D toy sticker look with crisp pet-sized silhouette, blocky geometric proportions, warm gold/tan body, black accessories, silver audio detail, clean hard edges, no shadows or scenery..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
